workflow.name: LPR.Leave Request Approval
workflow.comment: Single-stage manager approval for employee leave requests

email.name: LPR.Send Submission Confirmation
email.subject: Leave request submitted
email.body: Your leave request has been submitted for manager approval.

userTask.name: LPR.Manager Review
userTask.instructions: Review the employee leave request and select Approve or Reject.

notification.subject: Leave request awaiting approval for {{request.EmployeeName}}
notification.body:
Dear {{task.participantName}},

Please review the leave request for {{request.EmployeeName}} from {{request.StartDate}} to {{request.EndDate}}.

{{task.worklistLink}}
